summary: Frontend-only verification of Inventory (Envanter/Bestand) & Catalog enhancements: warehouse (Lager) badge on catalog after move, code column + input in inventory, stock warning badges (amber low <=5 / red out-of-stock), low-stock-first sort with empty-stock last, stock filter (all/in/low/out), search by name & code, edit updating code, and catalog regression. All 9 requested feature scenarios verified successfully. Cleanup of test inventory items performed at end (final rows = 0).
critical_code_review_comments: Envanter.jsx: LOW_STOCK constant duplicated between frontend and backend (both hard-coded to 5). Consider exposing threshold via a GET /api/inventory/config endpoint or shared constant so UI never drifts from backend classification of 'low'.

Envanter.jsx bulk-bar uses window.confirm() (native browser dialog) — not stylable, inconsistent with rest of the dashboard which uses shadcn Dialogs. Also breaks any potential Playwright dialog handler chaining under stress; consider a shadcn AlertDialog for confirmations.
Envanter.jsx renders name+code in the same <td> without a min-width, so on narrow tablet widths the code (font-mono, text-[11px]) can wrap awkwardly. Minor cosmetic.

Katalog.jsx moveToInventory only reload()s the current page; if a moved product falls outside the current filter/page after list reload it will not visually reflect the badge. Acceptable for now but worth documenting.
seed_data_creation: Created 4 inventory products (TEST-1 stock=3, TEST-OUT stock=0, TEST-HI stock=100, TEST-EMPTY stock=null) + 1 catalog-transferred product (RB-286 Addis Ababa Coffee) during the test run. ALL created inventory data has been bulk-deleted at the end (final rows = 0). Catalog product RB-286 remains in the catalog (as expected — catalog is source of truth); its 'Lager' badge is now visible on the catalog list.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Inventory verified feature-complete for stock warnings, sort order, filters, search (name/code), code column, and code editing. Katalog Lager badge appears blue with warehouse icon after move. If cleanup did not re-run for any reason, the transferred RB-286 could still appear in inventory — safe to delete via the /envanter page. Backend was already curl-verified by the main agent before this run.

verification_results.catalog_lager_badge: PASS - After ticking catalog-check and clicking catalog-to-inventory-btn ('In Bestand'), the 'Lager' badge (blue bg-sky-600 with Warehouse icon) rendered in the catalog row next to the DE and XML badges. Screenshot confirms.
verification_results.inventory_code_field: PASS - inventory-code input present in Add/Edit dialog; TEST-1 saved with code 'TEST-1' visible as monospace text under the product name.
verification_results.low_stock_amber_badge: PASS - TEST-1 (stock=3) shows amber pill with AlertTriangle icon (bg-amber-100 text-amber-700).
verification_results.out_of_stock_red: PASS - TEST-OUT (stock=0) shows red '0' with AlertTriangle warning icon (text-red-600).
verification_results.high_stock_plain: PASS (visually confirmed) - TEST-HI (stock=100) shows plain '100' with no badge. My automated regex assertion returned FAIL because every row also has a red delete-icon button (text-red-600), but the stock cell itself is plain; screenshot confirms correctness.
verification_results.sort_low_first_empty_last: PASS - Observed order with all four TEST rows: stock 0 → stock 3 → stock 100 → empty. Exactly as specified.
verification_results.stock_filter_in: PASS - 'Auf Lager' shows TEST-1 (3) + TEST-HI (100); excludes TEST-OUT and TEST-EMPTY.
verification_results.stock_filter_all: PASS - 'Alle Bestände' shows all 4 test products.
verification_results.search_by_code: PASS - typing 'TEST-1' returns exactly one matching row.
verification_results.search_by_name: PASS - typing 'High Stock' returns exactly one matching row.
verification_results.edit_preserves_updates_code: PASS - Edited TEST-1 code to 'TEST-1-UPD', saved, table reflects new code immediately.
verification_results.catalog_regression: PASS - /katalog still lists 50 rows per page, XML/DE badges still render correctly, no errors.
